name: ACM Digital Library
alternateName: Association for Computing Machinery Digital Library
description: The ACM Digital Library is the world's most comprehensive collection of full-text articles and bibliographic literature covering computing and information technology. Published by the Association for Computing Machinery (ACM), it provides access to journals, conference proceedings, magazines, newsletters, and technical reports spanning the complete history of ACM publications. As of January 2026, the ACM Digital Library is fully open access.

itemListElement.name: Open Access
itemListElement.description: Free basic access to the full ACM Digital Library corpus of computing research.

itemListElement.name: Academic Subscription
itemListElement.description: Institutional subscription for academic libraries with full access and analytics.

itemListElement.name: Corporate Subscription
itemListElement.description: Corporate subscription tier for professional access and bulk download capabilities.

itemListElement.name: Government Subscription
itemListElement.description: Government subscription pricing for public sector institutions.

potentialAction.name: ACM Digital Library Search API
potentialAction.description: Programmatic querying of computing literature across ACM's full publication corpus.

potentialAction.name: ACM Content Retrieval via DOI
potentialAction.description: Retrieve individual publications via persistent DOI-based URLs.
